goal: Continue replicating rk3576-home-assistant-voice for AX650 board-side Docker by adding practical validation tooling for the scaffold merged in PR #2.

requirement_alignment.goal: Advance the AX650 Home Assistant voice stack after PR #2 by adding focused, reviewable tooling that improves board-side validation readiness without deploying or publishing anything.
non_goals: Do not run deployment or production operations.
Do not merge the PR automatically.
Do not perform AX650 board-side execution unless explicitly requested.
expected_behavior: Repository keeps the same Home Assistant-facing service contract.
New validation tooling should run locally against fake endpoints and later against an AX650 board by changing host/port flags.
constraints_and_risks: Local checks cannot prove real AX650 inference works.
The machine still lacks Docker Compose plugin; use docker-compose config for local parse validation.
acceptance_checks: Each iteration is represented by a GitHub issue.
Local pytest coverage validates any new behavior.
Untracked AGENTS.md and plan.md are preserved and not staged.
requirement_alignment.validation_approach: Run python -m pytest -q and docker-compose config locally.
requirement_alignment.first_iteration_scope: Add a local smoke-check script for ASR/TTS/LLM HTTP endpoints and Wyoming TCP ports, with tests using fake local servers.
likely_follow_up_iterations: Use remote-infer to run smoke checks on an AX650 board when requested.
Replace or augment runtime scaffolds with confirmed prebuilt artifacts after board validation.

issues.title: feat[1]: add local service smoke checks
acceptance_checks: A script checks ASR /healthz, TTS /healthz, LLM /health or /v1/models, and Wyoming TCP ports.
The script accepts host/port flags so it can run against localhost, compose networking, or a board IP.
The script has clear pass/fail output and non-zero exit on failed required checks.
Tests cover success and failure paths with fake local HTTP/TCP servers.
README documents how to run the smoke check locally and against AX650.
Existing pytest and docker-compose config validation pass.

rounds.implementation_summary: Added a standard-library smoke checker for ASR/TTS/LLM HTTP endpoints and Wyoming TCP ports, plus fake-server tests and README usage.

validation.evidence: Returned non-zero with explicit FAIL lines for stopped local services

rounds.test_summary: Passed locally: pytest reported 13 passed; docker-compose config parsed successfully. Smoke checker failure behavior was manually exercised against stopped localhost services.
rounds.commit: HEAD commit for iteration 1; final hash reported by git/PR

assumptions: The target PR base branch is main.
GitHub CLI authentication is available for issues and PR creation.
AGENTS.md and plan.md are pre-existing local files and will not be staged unless explicitly needed.
